scenario_name: Scenario 15 — Concurrency Bug in Async JavaScript
justification: All pass criteria met: (1) 500 simultaneous DB/service calls and connection pool exhaustion clearly identified as the primary critical finding, (2) concurrency limiting recommended with p-limit example and specific concurrency cap, (3) does NOT invent a false shared-state race condition — correctly avoids claiming JS integer increments are unsafe, (4) TypeScript err.message type safety noted as a critical finding with proper fix, (5) safe_to_deploy is false.

observations.text: Correctly identifies unbounded concurrency as the real problem without fabricating a JS race condition
Provides concrete p-limit fix with tunable concurrency cap
Thorough TypeScript error handling analysis with instanceof narrowing fix
Bonus insights on Promise.allSettled for partial-failure resilience and unbounded error array growth
safe_to_deploy correctly set to false with clear rationale
